title: The Darkness Realm
body:
# IMPORTANT:
The versions listed were **rushed**, and they are **not** survival friendly. Most stuff is pretty much just placeholders, with the proper version getting released soon. The new version will include _a survival-friendly experience, animations, more content and better textures_.

### If you want to download this mod, I highly recommend waiting until the proper version releases.

Mod is developed via MCreator.

Developer: a degenerate UwU
